units.aiDescription: Discover the 2023 Four Winns HD5 OB — a premium bowrider that redefines on-water entertaining. Built to accommodate up to 13 passengers, this stunning vessel combines generous space with refined luxury for an unmatched boating experience. The fully enclosed head compartment adds a level of privacy and convenience rarely found in this class, making all-day adventures effortlessly comfortable. Constructed with Four Winns' signature StableVee® hull for a smooth, confident ride in any conditions, the HD5 OB features a sleek Solid White exterior with a bold Crimson Red gel accent stripe that turns heads at every marina. Safety and durability are built in from the ground up with NMMA certification, USCG and Canadian regulation compliance, and premium stainless steel hardware throughout — including cleats, bow and stern eyes, bow rails, and a stainless steel rub rail insert. Twin hidden telescoping ladders at both bow and stern make water entry and exit a breeze, while LED navigation lights keep you cruising safely after sunset. The fiberglass stringer system ensures long-lasting structural integrity, and the thoughtfully designed swim platforms fore and aft invite endless aquatic fun. At $82,500, this pre-owned 2023 Four Winns HD5 OB offers exceptional value for a nearly new luxury bowrider packed with premium features. Don't miss your chance to own this incredible boat!

Perfect for budget-conscious buyers, weekend warriors, or first-time boat owners, this pre-owned gem offers a fantastic opportunity to get out on the water without breaking the bank. The Sea Ray 185 is a versatile, easy-to-handle vessel well-suited for lake cruising, watersports, and casual family outings. Its compact size makes trailering and storage straightforward, while Sea Ray's classic hull design delivers a reliable and responsive ride. With nearly four decades of proven performance behind this model lineage, you can feel confident in the bones of this boat. Priced at just $5,900, this is one of the most accessible ways to own a piece of boating history from a legendary American manufacturer. Whether you're planning to restore it to its former glory or simply enjoy it as-is for relaxed summer days on the water, the 1985 Sea Ray 185 delivers outstanding value. With 36 photos available, you can get a thorough look at this classic before you visit. Come see it in person today and make your boating dreams a reality!

units.aiDescription: Introducing the 2016 Grady-White Freedom 307 — a masterpiece of coastal cruising and family fishing excellence. This extraordinary 30-foot dual console redefines what a big-water boat can be, blending offshore toughness with resort-level comfort in one breathtaking package. Grady-White's legendary 100% hand-laid hull and deck construction means unmatched durability and a confidence-inspiring ride whether you're navigating inshore flats or pushing offshore into open water. The Freedom 307 is loaded with premium features including dual automatic 2,600 GPH bilge pumps, an anchor windlass with remote helm switches, flush-mount pop-up cleats, blue LED cockpit lighting, a cockpit freshwater shower, 17 stainless steel drink holders, and an impressive array of 316-grade stainless steel hardware throughout. The seating is second to none, offering extraordinary comfort for the whole family, while the roomy, versatile layout accommodates both serious anglers and leisure cruisers with ease. A self-bailing cockpit, low-profile bow rail, and nonskid fiberglass liner round out the safety-forward design. At $159,900, this pre-owned Freedom 307 is your gateway to premium saltwater adventures. Explore all 41 photos and contact Grace Marine today to schedule your sea trial!

units.aiDescription: Claim your competitive edge on the water with the 2018 Crestliner PT 20 — twenty feet of pure bass fishing dominance. Endorsed by champion angler John Cox, the PT 20 is built for those who demand performance, durability, and fishability in one sleek package. At the heart of this pre-owned tournament-ready machine is a seamless all-welded aluminum hull that's lighter, tougher, and more responsive than fiberglass alternatives, getting you to your favorite spots faster and with more confidence. The PT 20's deck is wide open and smartly organized, giving you the freedom to move and fish without compromise. Highlights include a 45-gallon stern livewell to keep your catch in peak condition, a wider beam for superior stability, extensive rod storage to keep your arsenal organized, and a recessed trolling motor foot control for hands-free precision. The starboard console features lit toggle switches, a multifunction instrument panel with black sterling gauges, a 12V power outlet, and space for a 9-inch flush-mount electronics unit, keeping you connected to what's happening below the surface. At $24,999, the 2018 Crestliner PT 20 is a serious value for any bass angler ready to elevate their game. View all 41 photos and visit Grace Marine to make it yours today!

units.originalDescription: A dynamic silhouette of sporty, yet elegant style lines are perfectly accentuated by the lustrous double hull band gelcoat design of the Eclipse E 235. The look is further enhanced by Crownline’s patented F.A.S.T. Tab® hull design, adding a sexy edge while improving performance by providing enhanced planing efficiency, stability in high speed turns and improving fuel economy by minimizing drag. This beauty performs like a bowrider, but has added space and readily available amenities throughout. The party starts at the rear of the boat with Crownline’s trademarked Social Swim™ transom design with two Wetsounds speakers. There are six additional Wetsounds speakers throughout the boat.
